reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Buena atención estación limpia y tiene asador para descansar del largo viaje y siempre que paso tiene stock de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, clean station, and has a grill to rest after the long trip. They always have fuel in stock whenever I pass by.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGWmRFbFdWelpQWDFVd1VIbEhZMEZDVWsxa05rRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y limpieza, el servicio que brindan es muy bueno,  lo recomiendo para todo el viajante

(Translated by Google)
Excellent attention and cleanliness, the service they provide is very good, I recommend it to all travelers
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tvMmRsTXpiek5OZUhKcFYwSkxibmRqVkZwZk4yYxAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación, siempre está limpia y bien cuidada. Además, nunca falta stock, lo que se agradece mucho. Excelente servicio

(Translated by Google)
A very good station, always clean and well-maintained. Plus, they're always stocked, which is much appreciated. Excellent service.

A must-see stop, there's no other station within 100 km

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención de la chica .
Muy ricas las semitas de aquel lugar !
Lo recomiendo,pero tendían q poner más comestibles etc

(Translated by Google)
The girl was very attentive.
The semitas there were delicious! I recommend it, but they should add more food items, etc.

reviews.comment:
La estación cuenta con baños limpios y en buen estado negocio y churrasqueras con bancos y mesa

(Translated by Google)
The station has clean and well-maintained restrooms, a shop, and barbecue grills with benches and tables.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w4MWRrSnhTblZZVldsMVJWZFRWVkowTVc1WE9YYxAB

reviews.comment:
Chiquita, linda. Recomendable siempre parar un ratito, llenar el tanque, tomarse un cafecito y luego retomar el viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Small and lovely. It's always recommended to stop for a bit, fill up the tank, have a coffee, and then continue the journey.
